name: SanDisk Professional G-RAID SHUTTLE 4 80TB 4-Bay RAID Array - Removable Ultrastar Enterprise-class 7200RPM HDD - Transportable Design - Built-in Hardware RAID - Daisy-chaining for up to 5 Additional Devices - 2x Thunderbolt 3 Ports (SDPH34H-080T-NBAAB)
